abstract: Python3 scripts for periodically removing data older than 4 months from the folder dedicated to the OGS geoportal.
description: Python3 scripts for periodically removing old data created for the OGS geoportal. Tool to be run at the EU HFR Node. The applications are designed for High Frequency Radar (HFR) data management according to the European HFR node processing workflow. Data older than 4 months are removed from the OGS geoportal dedicated folder.
